sub_task: Verify premium model policy enforcement in commander agent

findings.match: partial - pool is broader than expected (includes all expected + 5 more)

gaps: No runtime guard or pre-launch model whitelist check
Enforcement relies on commander obeying prompt and self-reporting violations
Violation triggers 'partial' bundle status but doesn't prevent launch

worker_results.task: Check model override in task launches

findings.propagation_path: launcher --model/--models → get_worker_model() rotation → --model param to CLI agent
findings.child_launch_logging: launch_started JSONL records must include selected model
findings.fallback_policy: fallback marks bundle as 'partial', no auto-fallback to cheap models

findings.gap: No round-robin, rotation, or fair-allocation mechanism documented

findings.commander_docs: Complete - premium pool, banned models, and policy documented
findings.readme_docs: Partial - mentions premium child-model overrides, no full policy matrix
findings.skill_docs: Minimal - default model only, no premium/banned policy
findings.worker_merger_docs: None - no premium model policy in stampede-agent or stampede-merger
findings.gap: Premium model policy concentrated in commander agent only

key_findings: Premium model pool is defined and broader than expected (10 models vs 5 expected)
Banned child models are documented but enforcement is prompt-based, not runtime
Model override is required and propagated through launcher to agents
No rotation/fairness algorithm exists for model distribution
Documentation is concentrated in commander agent, sparse elsewhere
gaps_identified: No runtime enforcement of banned models - relies on self-reporting
No model rotation algorithm - distribution fairness not guaranteed
Premium policy documentation missing from skill and worker/merger agents
recommendations: Add runtime model whitelist validation in launcher before child launch
Implement round-robin or weighted rotation for fair model distribution
Propagate premium model policy documentation to SKILL.md and README
